pipeline.name: input_audit
pipeline.description: Find full Phase-1 log if available; otherwise use uploaded replay cases.

pipeline.name: parse_task
pipeline.description: Split Type1 into MC labels A-D and YNU labels Yes/No/Uncertain.

pipeline.name: entity_horn_solver
pipeline.description: Parse facts/rules into single-entity literals; forward-chain Horn implications; retain certificate premise indices.

pipeline.name: mc_certificate_answer
pipeline.description: For A-D options, prove/decompose claims; fire only on exactly one PROVEN option.

pipeline.name: ynu_experimental_audit
pipeline.description: YNU target parser is audited only; not promoted unless full-log gate has zero wrong and no premises regression.

pipeline.name: safe_override
pipeline.description: Override existing model only when certificate answer is non-null and gate passes; otherwise keep original model output.

pipeline.name: metrics_and_gap_audit
pipeline.description: Write coverage, fired precision, status accuracy, F1/recall where reconstructable, abstain breakdown, overfit/underfit risk.
